mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, user_id, title, content, category_id, priority, start_date, end_date, `status`, finish_time, is_delete, is_top, focus_time
mapper.select:
select
from tb_todo where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} and is_delete = 1
mapper.insert: insert into tb_todo (create_time, update_time, user_id, title, content, category_id, priority, start_date, end_date, `status`, finish_time, is_delete, is_top) values (#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{priority,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{isTop,jdbcType=TINYINT})

insert into tb_todo
create_time,
update_time,
user_id,
title,
content,
category_id,
priority,
start_date,
end_date,
`status`,
finish_time,
is_delete,
is_top,

mapper.update:
update tb_todo
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
priority = #{priority,jdbcType=TINYINT},
start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE},
end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
finish_time = #{finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT},
is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_todo set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, priority = #{priority,jdbcType=TINYINT}, start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, finish_time = #{finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT}, is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=TINYINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_todo (create_time, update_time, user_id, title, content, category_id, priority, start_date, end_date, `status`, finish_time, is_delete, is_top) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.priority,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.isTop,jdbcType=TINYINT})

insert into tb_todo (create_time, update_time, user_id, title, content, category_id, priority, start_date, end_date, `status`, finish_time, is_delete, is_top) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.priority,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.isTop,jdbcType=TINYINT})
on duplicate key update create_time=values(create_time), update_time=values(update_time), user_id=values(user_id), title=values(title), content=values(content), category_id=values(category_id), priority=values(priority), start_date=values(start_date), end_date=values(end_date), `status`=values(`status`), finish_time=values(finish_time), is_delete=values(is_delete), is_top=values(is_top)

delete from tb_todo where id in
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update.foreach:
update tb_todo
create_time = #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{item.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
category_id = #{item.categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
priority = #{item.priority,jdbcType=TINYINT},
start_date = #{item.startDate,jdbcType=DATE},
end_date = #{item.endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
`status` = #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
finish_time = #{item.finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_delete = #{item.isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT},
is_top = #{item.isTop,jdbcType=TINYINT},
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

id,

create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, priority = #{priority,jdbcType=TINYINT}, start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE}, end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, finish_time = #{finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT}, is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=TINYINT},

insert into tb_todo
id,
create_time,
update_time,
user_id,
title,
content,
category_id,
priority,
start_date,
end_date,
`status`,
finish_time,
is_delete,
is_top,
values
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{priority,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{startDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{isTop,jdbcType=TINYINT},
on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
category_id = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
priority = #{priority,jdbcType=TINYINT},
start_date = #{startDate,jdbcType=DATE},
end_date = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
finish_time = #{finishTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT},
is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mapper.select:
select
from tb_todo
and is_delete = #{isDelete,jdbcType=TINYINT}
and is_delete = 1
and user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
and id not in (select todo_id from tb_todo_tag)
order by create_time desc
select `status` as status, count(*) as count from tb_todo where is_delete = 1 group by `status`
select priority, count(*) as count from tb_todo where is_delete = 1 group by priority

select DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(*) as count from tb_todo where is_delete = 1 and DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date

select DATE(end_date) as deadline, count(*) as count from tb_todo where is_delete = 1 and status = 1 and end_date between now() and date_add(now(), interval #{days} day) group by DATE(end_date) order by deadline
select c.id as categoryId, c.name as categoryName, count(t.id) as count from tb_todo t left join tb_category c on t.category_id = c.id where t.is_delete = 1 and c.is_default = 1 group by c.id, c.name

select t.id as tagId, t.name as tagName, count(tt.todo_id) as frequency from tb_tag t left join tb_todo_tag tt on t.id = tt.tag_id left join tb_todo todo on tt.todo_id = todo.id where todo.is_delete = 1 group by t.id, t.name order by frequency desc

select DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') as date, count(*) as total, sum(case when status = 2 then 1 else 0 end) as completed, sum(case when status = 2 then 1 else 0 end) / count(*) * 100 as completionRate from tb_todo where is_delete = 1 and DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') order by date
mapper.update: update tb_todo set category_id = #{newCategoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = now() where category_id = #{oldCategoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
